name: osint-recon
description: OSINT identity enumeration across hundreds of public sites by username or email, with a browser-first workflow that verifies accounts in a real browser, captures court-ready screenshot evidence, and builds a self-contained HTML report. Includes self-healing detection, an optional infostealer-leak check, a combined recon workflow, and an ADS-B Exchange flight-tracking analyst for aircraft history, snapshot evidence, KML export, and scheduled aircraft monitoring.
